mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_plan_benefits (title, content, display_yn, create_id, modified_id) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{displayYn}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_benefits SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, display_yn = #{displayYn}, modified_date = NOW(), modified_id = #{modifiedId} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.sql: a.id ,a.plan_list_id ,a.order_no ,b.plan_name as planName ,a.plan_benefits_id ,c.title as benefitTitle ,c.content as benefitContent ,c.major_category_id ,c.minor_category_id ,c.icon ,(select name from tb_pmb_benefits_category where id = c.major_category_id LIMIT 1) majorCategoryName ,(select name from tb_pmb_benefits_category where id = c.minor_category_id AND parent_id = c.major_category_id LIMIT 1) minorCategoryName ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm ,c.provider ,c.icon benefitIcon ,c.benefit_url ,c.benefit_image ,c.benefit_content as benefitContent2
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_benefits c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_benefits_id = c.id AND c.display_yn = 'Y' AND NOW() >= c.display_period_start AND NOW() <= c.display_period_end
ORDER BY a.plan_list_id, a.order_no, a.id desc
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_benefits c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_benefits_id = c.id

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_benefits c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_benefits_id = c.id AND a.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list (plan_list_id, plan_benefits_id,order_no,create_id, modified_id) VALUES ( #{planListId}, #{planBenefitsId}, #{orderNo}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list SET plan_list_id = #{planListId}, plan_benefits_id = #{planBenefitsId}, order_no = #{orderNo}, modified_date = NOW(), modified_id = #{modifiedId} WHERE id=#{id}
